texto: Iedolas : A curious old law I still permit in the outlands. A thief who escapes his captor can no longer be held to account for his crime.Regis : A warning to the victim? Never show weakness, lest you forgo the hand of justice.Iedolas : Oh no, good king. Far from it. It is a warning to the hand of justice itself: Never to loose its grip.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Takeshi Nozue que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Iedolas : A curious old law I still permit in the outlands. A thief who escapes his captor can no…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, justice, kingsglaive, com foco em kingsglaive e weakness.
